task_completion.description: Create a 'Photovoltaic (detailed)' project and set the location to Phoenix, AZ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SAM interface showing the active model is 'Photovoltaic (detailed)' and the Location and Resource tab showing Phoenix, AZ selected in the weather file list.

task_completion.description: Configure the system to use bifacial modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Module tab in SAM with a bifacial module selected from the library or the 'Bifacial' configuration options enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the system capacity to approximately 2,000 kWdc (2 MW).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the System Design tab showing a Nameplate capacity or Desired array size between 1800 and 2200 kWdc.

task_completion.description: Configure 1-axis tracking and a Ground Coverage Ratio (GCR) of 0.20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the System Design tab showing the Tracking & Orientation set to '1-axis' and the Ground Coverage Ratio (GCR) input field set to 0.20.

task_completion.description: Set the ground clearance height to 3.0 meters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the System Design or Bifacial configuration section showing the 'Ground clearance height' input field set to 3.0 meters.

task_completion.description: Save the project as 'agrivoltaic.sam' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SAM window title bar displaying 'agrivoltaic.sam', a 'Save As' dialog pointing to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/agrivoltaic.sam, or a file manager showing the saved file in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the NREL SAM graphical user interface to configure the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SAM application open with various tabs (Location, Module, System Design) being actively clicked and modified.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or terminal to manually write or spoof the .sam file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows or text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open where the agent is directly writing JSON/XML/SAM file contents.

integrity.description: The agent actually inputted the required values into the SAM interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent typing or selecting the specific values (0.20 GCR, 3.0m clearance, Phoenix AZ) within the SAM application input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'agrivoltaic.sam'. The system capacity must be between 1800 and 2200 kWdc. The Ground Coverage Ratio (GCR) must be exactly 0.2. The ground clearance must be exactly 3.0 meters. The tracking mode must be 1-axis tracking. The location must be Phoenix, AZ. The model must be 'Photovoltaic (detailed)' with bifacial modules.
